testcase.name: test_categories_post_creates_with_created_by

failure.message: AssertionError: created_by mismatch: got None vs uid g1mbpu5l0xt assert None == 'g1mbpu5l0xt' + where 'g1mbpu5l0xt' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff9d2187b1c0>('uid') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff9d2187b1c0> = {'email': 'eden@tbi-center.fr', 'name': 'Admin Eden', 'role': 'superadmin', 'uid': 'g1mbpu5l0xt'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_livraison1.py:79: in test_categories_post_creates_with_created_by assert created_by == me.get("uid"), f"created_by mismatch: got {created_by} vs uid {me.get('uid')}" E AssertionError: created_by mismatch: got None vs uid g1mbpu5l0xt E assert None == 'g1mbpu5l0xt' E + where 'g1mbpu5l0xt' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff9d2187b1c0>('uid') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff9d2187b1c0> = {'email': 'eden@tbi-center.fr', 'name': 'Admin Eden', 'role': 'superadmin', 'uid': 'g1mbpu5l0xt'}.get

testcase.name: test_categories_put_forbidden_for_agent

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 403 for agent PUT, got 404 Error 
Cannot PUT /api/categories/32
assert 404 == 403 + where 404 = .status_code

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_livraison1.py:103: in test_categories_put_forbidden_for_agent assert r.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 for agent PUT, got {r.status_code} {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 for agent PUT, got 404 E E E E Error E E E 
Cannot PUT /api/categories/32
E E E E assert 404 == 403 E + where 404 = .status_code

testcase.name: test_portfolio_list_has_agentName_field

failure.message: AssertionError: agentName missing in portfolio item keys: ['id', 'category_id', 'name', 'sub_type', 'address', 'city', 'bp', 'tel', 'fax', 'mail', 'web', 'created_at', 'niu', 'agent_id', 'status'] assert 'agentName' in {'address': '69, Rue Nkoua Edouard La Base Brazzaville; Bureau: 9 rue Mbonchi Poto-Poto', 'agent_id': 'g1mbpu5l0xt', 'bp': '', 'category_id': 13, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_livraison1.py:161: in test_portfolio_list_has_agentName_field assert "agentName" in data[0], f"agentName missing in portfolio item keys: {list(data[0].keys())}" E AssertionError: agentName missing in portfolio item keys: ['id', 'category_id', 'name', 'sub_type', 'address', 'city', 'bp', 'tel', 'fax', 'mail', 'web', 'created_at', 'niu', 'agent_id', 'status'] E assert 'agentName' in {'address': '69, Rue Nkoua Edouard La Base Brazzaville; Bureau: 9 rue Mbonchi Poto-Poto', 'agent_id': 'g1mbpu5l0xt', 'bp': '', 'category_id': 13, ...}

testcase.name: test_portfolio_post_status_perdu_with_lost_reason
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_livraison1.py:175: in test_portfolio_post_status_perdu_with_lost_reason assert item["lost_reason"] == "Prix trop élevé" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'lost_reason'

testcase.name: test_opportunity_post_persists_agent_id_and_visible_to_agent

failure.message: AssertionError: agent_id not persisted: None vs vob955lxw0b assert None == 'vob955lxw0b'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_livraison1.py:246: in test_opportunity_post_persists_agent_id_and_visible_to_agent assert agent_id == me["uid"], f"agent_id not persisted: {agent_id} vs {me['uid']}" E AssertionError: agent_id not persisted: None vs vob955lxw0b E assert None == 'vob955lxw0b'

testcase.name: test_quote_created_without_number_gets_monthly_format
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_livraison1.py:358: in test_quote_created_without_number_gets_monthly_format assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text[:500] E AssertionError: {"error":"Server error: null value in column \"number\" of relation \"quotes\" violates not-null constraint"} E assert 500 in (200, 201) E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_quote_numbers_unique_per_month
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_livraison1.py:382: in test_quote_numbers_unique_per_month assert r.status_code in (200, 201) E assert 500 in (200, 201) E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
